rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Mac AppleScript Input Prompt

rules.rule_text:
title: Mac AppleScript Input Prompt
id: cff40f2b-46e9-49cc-8ba5-dde6403ab453
status: experimental
description: "Adversaries leverage AppleScript to try to steal the user\u2019s login\
  \ password. \nThis analytic attempts to detect that activity via the first variation.\
  \ \nPart of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/applescript/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.002
logsource:
  product: macos
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - osascript
    - display dialog
    - password
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
